title: Registry / Federation Targets
summary: A registry artifact covering Federation Targets.
content:
{
  "$schema": "./federation-targets.schema.json",
  "federation_targets": [
    {
      "id": "xananode.protocol",
      "name": "XanaNode Protocol Substrate",
      "namespace": "xananode.protocol",
      "description": "A substrate source built directly from the XanaNode Protocol repository, preserving the protocol's schemas, registries, specs, governance artifacts, and canonical documents while carrying lower-level repository files as attached assets when they do not deserve independent node status.",
      "status": "canonical",
      "repository": {
        "type": "git",
        "url": "https://github.com/kingc95/XanaNode-Protocol.git",
        "default_branch": "main",
        "substrate_path": "substrate-source"
      },
      "recommended_mode": "mounted",
      "licenses": ["CC-BY-4.0", "Apache-2.0"],
      "homepage": "https://xananode.com/"
    },
    {
      "id": "xananode.canonical",
      "name": "XanaNode Canonical Substrate",
      "namespace": "xananode.canonical",
      "description": "The canonical XanaNode substrate for protocol vocabulary, project identity, governance, software stack records, raw source snapshots, branding, and self-referential examples.",
      "status": "canonical",
      "repository": {
        "type": "git",
        "url": "https://github.com/kingc95/XanaNode-Canonical-Substrate.git",
        "default_branch": "main"
      },
      "recommended_mode": "mounted",
      "licenses": ["CC-BY-4.0", "Apache-2.0"],
      "homepage": "https://xananode.com/"
    },
    {
      "id": "xananode.core",
      "name": "XanaNode Core SDK Substrate",
      "namespace": "xananode.core",
      "description": "A substrate source built directly from the XanaNode Core SDK repository, preserving its implementation identity, schemas, registries, templates, executable-contract artifacts, and key documents while carrying lower-level repository files as attached assets unless they have independent semantic weight.",
      "status": "official",
      "repository": {
        "type": "git",
        "url": "https://github.com/kingc95/XanaNode-Core-SDK.git",
        "default_branch": "main",
        "substrate_path": "substrate-source"
      },
      "recommended_mode": "mounted",
      "licenses": ["Apache-2.0"],
      "homepage": "https://xananode.com/"
    },
    {
      "id": "xananode.workspace",
      "name": "XanaNode Workspace Substrate",
      "namespace": "xananode.workspace",
      "description": "A substrate source built directly from the XanaNode Workspace repository, preserving the workspace engine, CLI surface, templates, packaged executable artifacts, and key documents while carrying lower-level repository files as attached assets unless they merit their own nodes.",
      "status": "official",
      "repository": {
        "type": "git",
        "url": "https://github.com/kingc95/XanaNode-Workspace.git",
        "default_branch": "main",
        "substrate_path": "substrate-source"
      },
      "recommended_mode": "mounted",
      "licenses": ["Apache-2.0"],
      "homepage": "https://xananode.com/"
    },
    {
      "id": "xananode.studio",
      "name": "XanaNode Studio Substrate",
      "namespace": "xananode.studio",
      "description": "A substrate source built directly from the XanaNode Studio repository, preserving the Studio application identity, major authoring artifacts, and key documents while carrying lower-level implementation files as attached assets unless they are independently citable or governable.",
      "status": "official",
      "repository": {
        "type": "git",
        "url": "https://github.com/kingc95/XanaNode-Studio.git",
        "default_branch": "main",
        "substrate_path": "substrate-source"
      },
      "recommended_mode": "mounted",
      "licenses": ["Apache-2.0"],
      "homepage": "https://xananode.com/"
    },
    {
      "id": "xananode.mobile",
      "name": "XanaNode Mobile Substrate",
      "namespace": "xananode.mobile",
      "description": "A substrate source built directly from the XanaNode Mobile repository, preserving the mobile application's identity, capture workflows, and key documents while carrying lower-level implementation files as attached assets unless they have independent semantic weight.",
      "status": "official",
      "repository": {
        "type": "git",
        "url": "https://github.com/kingc95/XanaNode-Mobile.git",
        "default_branch": "main",
        "substrate_path": "substrate-source"
      },
      "recommended_mode": "mounted",
      "licenses": ["Apache-2.0"],
      "homepage": "https://xananode.com/"
    },
    {
      "id": "xananode.hugo",
      "name": "XanaNode Hugo Theme Substrate",
      "namespace": "xananode.hugo",
      "description": "A substrate source built directly from the XanaNode Hugo repository, preserving the Hugo projection layer's identity, projection-facing documents, and key theme artifacts while carrying lower-level implementation files as attached assets unless they deserve their own nodes.",
      "status": "official",
      "repository": {
        "type": "git",
        "url": "https://github.com/kingc95/XanaNode-Hugo.git",
        "default_branch": "main",
        "substrate_path": "substrate-source"
      },
      "recommended_mode": "mounted",
      "licenses": ["Apache-2.0"],
      "homepage": "https://xananode.com/"
    },
    {
      "id": "xananode.alphabet",
      "name": "XanaNode Alphabet Substrate",
      "namespace": "xananode.alphabet",
      "description": "A deliberately small example substrate with a start trail, A-Z letter nodes, typed relationships, and bundled media assets for every letter.",
      "status": "example",
      "repository": {
        "type": "git",
        "url": "https://github.com/kingc95/XanaNode-Alphabet-Substrate.git",
        "default_branch": "main"
      },
      "recommended_mode": "mounted",
      "licenses": ["CC0"],
      "homepage": "https://xananode.com/"
    },
    {
      "id": "xananode.lineage",
      "name": "XanaNode Lost Lineage Substrate",
      "namespace": "xananode.lineage",
      "description": "A lineage substrate for the historical and conceptual path into XanaNode.",
      "status": "community",
      "repository": {
        "type": "git",
        "url": "https://github.com/kingc95/XanaNode-Core-SDK.git",
        "default_branch": "main",
        "substrate_path": "packs/xananode-lineage"
      },
      "recommended_mode": "mounted",
      "licenses": ["CC-BY-4.0"],
      "homepage": "https://xananode.com/"
    }
  ]
}
